penalties.title: Overtime — first band
penalties.plainLanguage: Overtime is paid at 150% of the base rate (Overtime — first band).

penalties.title: Overtime — after first band
penalties.plainLanguage: Overtime is paid at 200% of the base rate (Overtime — after first band).
